name: @vanillagreen/pi-qol
description_en: Pi quality-of-life extension: compact statusline/π prompt, reliable multiline input, styled pasted-image chips, session naming/search/context import, scheduled prompts, handoff, permission prompts, notifications, custom compaction, and a collapsed-thinkin
description_zh: Pi 质量生活扩展：紧凑状态栏/π 提示、可靠的多行输入、样式化的粘贴图像芯片、会话命名/搜索/上下文导入、计划提示、交接、权限提示、通知、自定义压缩和折叠思考模式
